text.title: Internal Link Audit Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the rewire plan and audit report. Subagent must satisfy this before applying any changes.

forbidden.pattern: orphan_count > 0 with rewire_plan missing actions to address each orphan
cluster_coverage with any cluster_to_pillar_pct < 0.80 OR pillar_to_cluster_pct < 0.80 without rewire plan addressing it
anchor_distribution exact_match_pct > 0.40 in any cluster (violates r3)
over_linked_hubs with incoming_link_count > 200 AND intentional_navigation_root_bool == false AND no rewire plan trim
baseline_metrics absent OR post_rewire_metric_commitment missing (violates r5)
rewire_plan actions outside the closed action_enum

allowed-transformations.transformation: Group multiple anchor-change actions for the same source_url into a single batch entry.
Mark intentional navigation roots (homepage, /resources/) as exempt from over-linked-hub rule with documented rationale.
Stage rewire plan into phases (P1 critical orphans, P2 anchor diversity, P3 over-linked hub trim) for change-control.

list.item: Orphan count is 0 in target state
Over-linked hubs are either trimmed or documented as navigation roots
